examples: An animal(B. bonasus) of Europe, similar to but somewhat smaller than the bison; a wisent.
A cousin of the American bison is the wisent of Europe. It is now extinct in the wild but about 400 live in the safety of zoos.
Suddenly, there's a crashing in the underbrush, and a dozen wisent—Bison bonasus, European bison—burst from where they've been browsing on young shoots.
